revenue_recognition.franchise_fees: Initial fees deferred and recognized over expected contract life. Ongoing royalties recognized over time as franchisees derive value from IP license.
revenue_recognition.system_service_fees: Recognized over time; based on % of franchised hotel's revenue. Revenue recognized on gross basis; managed to break-even over time but timing mismatches expected.
revenue_recognition.direct_expense_reimbursements: Recognized on gross basis (Company acts as principal). Includes incremental reservation/distribution costs reimbursed dollar-for-dollar.
revenue_recognition.other_revenues: Recognized in period of related transaction/event. Includes QA penalties, pre-opening fees, admin fees, contract termination fees ($2.1M in 2024, $0.2M in 2023).
revenue_recognition.performance_obligation: IP license + system services = single performance obligation (series of services over time). Output method based on performance completed to date. Company recognizes revenue to the amount it has right to bill. Variable consideration — most likely amount method used.

cash_and_cash_equivalents.definition: Cash on hand, demand deposits, short-term highly liquid investments with original maturities of 3 months or less
cash_and_cash_equivalents.fdic_risk: Deposits exceed $250,000 at one institution not insured by FDIC

accounts_receivable.description: Franchise fees, system service fees, and other amounts due from franchisees including cost reimbursements
accounts_receivable.allowance_method: Made when collection considered doubtful; considers historical collection activity and business forecasts

contract_acquisition_costs.description: Direct incremental costs incurred to obtain contracts with customers
contract_acquisition_costs.amortization: Straight-line over initial non-cancellable term or expected contract life
contract_acquisition_costs.impairment: Reviewed when events indicate carrying amount may not be recoverable. No material impairment in 2024 or 2023.

net_investment_in_leases.description: Sales-type lease agreements with franchisees for IT equipment over 5-year terms, fully maturing in 2025
net_investment_in_leases.purchase_option: Lessees have option to purchase; Company believes reasonably certain to exercise
net_investment_in_leases.interest_income: None — sales price equals carrying value of underlying equipment

useful_lives.franchise_agreements: ~20 years (10 years weighted-average remaining as of 2024)
useful_lives.software_licenses: Remaining non-cancellable term (~3 years weighted-average remaining as of 2024)

intangible_assets.impairment: Reviewed annually or when events indicate. No impairment in 2024 or 2023.
intangible_assets.software_license_liability: Estimated liability remeasured at each reporting date. $0.5M current + $1.2M non-current in 2024.

income_taxes.status: As an LLC, not subject to federal income taxes. May be subject to state/local taxes in certain jurisdictions.

brand_launch_expenses.description: In 2022, incurred $2.5M in costs related to payments to certain franchisees for exemptions within areas of protection to facilitate ESA Select Suites brand launch
brand_launch_expenses.satisfaction_method: Majority via net reduction in franchise fees paid by applicable franchisees

manager_agreement.services: Overhead services (executive management, accounting, business development, financial analysis, training, technology) and system services
manager_agreement.classification: Overhead in G&A; system services in system service expenses

lease_accounting: Sales-type leases only (IT equipment, fully maturing 2025). No operating leases, no ROU assets, no maturity schedule needed.
advertising_fund_accounting: No separate advertising fund. System Services Fee (4.5% of GRR) serves as pooled marketing/system fund. No periodic accounting provided to franchisees. In 2024, $5.3M spent on marketing (per Item 6 Note 2 disclosure, not financial statement note).
